summary: Frontend testing completed for Global Access shipping website. CRITICAL session persistence bug is NOW FIXED. Users remain logged in after page refresh. All core features tested: registration, login, dashboard, navigation, and Create Shipment functionality.

minor_issues.issue: Loading spinner shows briefly after page refresh before content loads - this is expected behavior during auth state restoration
Multiple useEffect hooks have missing dependencies (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) in AuthContext.jsx, Dashboard.jsx, ShipmentsPage.jsx, etc.

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with Login and Get Started buttons
User registration flow works - new user created successfully
User login flow works - redirects to dashboard after login
CRITICAL: Session persists after page refresh on /dashboard - user stays logged in
CRITICAL: Session persists after page refresh on /dashboard/shipments - user stays logged in
Auth state shows SIGNED_IN after page refresh (INITIAL_SESSION event handled correctly)
Dashboard displays correctly with stats cards (Total Shipments, In Transit, Delivered, Pending)
User profile visible in sidebar (name and role)
Sidebar navigation works (Overview, Shipments, Create Shipment)
Create Shipment navigation works - navigates to /dashboard/shipments/new
Create Shipment form loads with Sender Information, Recipient Information, Package Details sections
Create Shipment form pre-fills sender info from user profile
Live badge (realtime indicator) visible in header
Welcome back toast message shows after login
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.jsx line 91: useEffect has missing dependency 'user' - intentional to prevent infinite loops but should add eslint-disable comment
Multiple pages have useEffect dependency warnings - consider using useCallback for fetch functions
seed_data_creation: Created test user via registration: test_session_1774377726@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session persistence bug is FIXED. The INITIAL_SESSION event from Supabase auth is now properly handled in AuthContext.jsx. Test user created: test_session_1774377726@test.com / TestPassword123!. All core flows working: registration, login, dashboard, navigation, create shipment. The loading spinner appearing briefly after refresh is expected behavior during auth state restoration.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Session persistence failure - users logged out after page refresh
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: AuthContext.jsx was not properly handling the INITIAL_SESSION event from Supabase auth. When page loads with existing session in localStorage, Supabase fires INITIAL_SESSION event which was not being processed correctly.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Main agent updated AuthContext.jsx to: 1) Set up auth subscription BEFORE calling getSession(), 2) Handle INITIAL_SESSION event to restore user state from existing session, 3) Added fallback checkSession() with proper timing to handle edge cases
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested login -> refresh -> verify user stays logged in. Console shows 'Auth state changed: SIGNED_IN' after refresh, confirming session restoration works.
